Keywords: trend, time, line, temporal, history, change, growth
Color Guidance: Use distinct colors for each line. Minimum 3:1 contrast ratio for colorblind users.
Accessibility Notes: Label axes clearly. Provide data table fallback. Use patterns/textures for colorblind.

Keywords: compare, comparison, side-by-side, benchmark, versus, diff
Color Guidance: Use consistent colors for same categories. High contrast for different groups.
Accessibility Notes: Label bars directly when possible. Avoid more than 6 categories.

Keywords: part, composition, percentage, share, breakdown, proportion, composition
Color Guidance: Use sequential colors for ordered data. Maximum 6 slices in pie chart.
Accessibility Notes: Label slices directly or with leader lines. Provide data table.

Keywords: distribution, spread, histogram, frequency, range, density
Secondary Options: Box Plot, Violin Plot, Density Plot
Color Guidance: Use sequential colors from light to dark. Highlight outliers.
Accessibility Notes: Label axes clearly. Show bin ranges. Provide statistics summary.

Keywords: correlation, relationship, scatter, cluster, association, pattern
Color Guidance: Use color to encode third variable. Size for fourth variable.
Accessibility Notes: Label points on hover. Show correlation coefficient.

Keywords: funnel, conversion, pipeline, stages, drop-off, flow, stages
Color Guidance: Use sequential colors from top to bottom. Highlight drop-off stages.
Accessibility Notes: Label each stage with count and percentage. Show conversion rate.

Keywords: geo, map, location, region, heatmap, geographic, location
Color Guidance: Use sequential color scale for density. Divergent for +/- values.
Accessibility Notes: Provide alternative table view. Colorblind-safe palette.

Keywords: hierarchy, tree, parent, child, org, structure, hierarchy
Color Guidance: Use color to encode category. Size to encode value.
Accessibility Notes: Label nodes with names. Provide collapse/expand.

Keywords: flow, sankey, transfer, migration, movement, flow
Color Guidance: Use consistent colors for same flows. Opacity for flow volume.
Accessibility Notes: Label nodes and flows. Show values on hover.

Keywords: network, graph, relationship, connection, node, edge
Color Guidance: Use color for node groups. Size for importance. Thickness for connection strength.
Accessibility Notes: Label important nodes. Provide alternative list view.

Keywords: kpi, metric, number, indicator, score, performance
Color Guidance: Use semantic colors: green positive, red negative, amber neutral.
Accessibility Notes: Include trend arrow and comparison period. Clear labeling.

Keywords: gauge, progress, completion, target, goal, achievement
Secondary Options: Progress Bar, Donut Progress, Radial Progress
Color Guidance: Use semantic colors: green (complete), amber (in progress), red (behind).
Accessibility Notes: Show current value and target. Label clearly.

Keywords: radar, spider, comparison, multi-axis, profile, assessment
Color Guidance: Use distinct colors for each axis. Fill with semi-transparent color.
Accessibility Notes: Label axes clearly. Show values on hover.

Keywords: waterfall, cascade, bridge, breakdown, contribution
Color Guidance: Use green for positive, red for negative. Blue for totals.
Accessibility Notes: Label each segment with value. Show running total.

Keywords: candlestick, stock, trading, ohlc, financial, market
Secondary Options: Line Chart with Volume, Heikin Ashi
Color Guidance: Green for up, red for down. Volume bars in neutral color.
Accessibility Notes: Show open, high, low, close values on hover.

Keywords: calendar, heatmap, daily, weekly, monthly, schedule
Color Guidance: Use sequential colors from light to dark. Green for activity.
Accessibility Notes: Show date and value on hover. Provide month/week labels.

Keywords: error, uncertainty, confidence, margin, range, error bar
Secondary Options: Confidence Interval, Box Plot, Fan Chart
Color Guidance: Use semi-transparent bands for confidence intervals.
Accessibility Notes: Show confidence level (e.g., 95% CI). Label clearly.

Keywords: real-time, live, streaming, update, monitor, realtime
Secondary Options: Streaming Bar, Live Gauges, Real-time Scatter
Color Guidance: Use animation for smooth updates. Limit data points for performance.
Accessibility Notes: Show last update time. Provide pause/resume control.

Keywords: multivariate, multi-variable, parallel, complex
Color Guidance: Use color for cluster/group. Brush axes for filtering.
Accessibility Notes: Label axes. Provide brushing for selection.

Keywords: nominal, categorical, category, discrete, type
Secondary Options: Horizontal Bar, Lollipop Chart, Waffle Chart
Color Guidance: Use distinct colors for each category. Maximum 8 categories.
Accessibility Notes: Label categories clearly. Sort by value when possible.
